content.problemStatement: Write a program for the coding challenge "Cows and Sequence". Refer to LeetCode description: https://codeforces.com/contest/283/problem/A
content.inputFormat: The input consists of a single string s of length n, containing only the characters 'H' and 'T'.
content.outputFormat: The output should be the number of cows.

solution.approach: Count the number of 'H' characters in the string.
